# SG Weather Ops Dashboard

> SG Weather Ops Dashboard is an AI-assisted full-stack TypeScript deployment case study for tracking Singapore weather snapshots. It uses a React/Vite/Tailwind frontend, an Express backend, SQLite persistence through Drizzle ORM, and data.gov.sg weather APIs.

Important notes:
- Local repository files are the source of truth for implementation details.
- Run commands from the repository root unless a referenced document says otherwise.
- Verify behavior with `npm test`, `npm run build`, and `npm run lint` before treating code or documentation changes as complete.
- This file is a curated orientation guide for LLMs and agents; it is not an exhaustive file index.

## Core Documentation

- [README](README.md): Project overview, quick start, API summary, data flow, external API references, and feature task list.
- [Starlight docs overview](docs/src/content/docs/index.mdx): User-facing docs entrypoint with architecture summary, key features, and source map.
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Workspace layout and high-level frontend, backend, scripts, and docs responsibilities.
- [Commands](docs/COMMANDS.md): Canonical development, build, test, lint, docs, database, and troubleshooting commands.
- [API endpoints](docs/src/content/docs/reference/api-endpoints.md): REST behavior for health, location CRUD, browser-position create, refresh, and frontend logging.
- [Database schema](docs/src/content/docs/reference/database-schema.md): SQLite table shape, Drizzle mapping, migrations, defaults, and data access helpers.
- [Weather data pipeline](docs/src/content/docs/guides/weather-data.md): data.gov.sg endpoint usage, station and region matching, snapshot shape, and partial failure handling.

## Implementation Entry Points

- [Express app](backend/src/server.ts): App construction, security headers, JSON limits, health route, frontend logging, API mounting, and Vite/static serving.
- [Location routes](backend/src/routes/locations.ts): `/api/locations*` route behavior, input validation, duplicate handling, browser geolocation matching, and provider errors.
- [Weather client](backend/src/weather.ts): Singapore data.gov.sg client, provider aggregation, nearest-area/station/region matching, and `WeatherSnapshot` construction.
- [Database helpers](backend/src/db.ts): Drizzle-backed persistence helpers for listing, creating, refreshing, deleting, and resetting locations.
- [Database schema](backend/src/schema.ts): Drizzle table definition for saved coordinates and persisted weather snapshot fields.
- [Frontend API client](frontend/src/api.ts): Browser fetch wrapper and frontend request/response contracts.
- [Frontend state](frontend/src/state/store.tsx): Location list, selected location, create/refresh/delete actions, and UI state coordination.
- [Frontend app shell](frontend/src/App.tsx): Main dashboard composition and selected-location rendering.
- [Frontend components](frontend/src/components): Sidebar, cards, hero, metric tiles, hourly strip, 4-day forecast, map, theme selector, and geolocation button.
- [Frontend shared types](frontend/src/types.ts): TypeScript contracts shared across frontend state and components.

## Agent and Workflow Guidance

- [Agent instructions](AGENTS.md): Repository-specific rules for scope control, permissions, code style, testing, documentation, security, skills, and quality gates.
- [TypeScript conventions](docs/TYPESCRIPT.md): Strict TypeScript expectations, workspace differences, error handling, and import style.
- [Theme guidance](docs/THEMES.md): Existing UI theme concepts and visual direction for frontend styling tasks.
- [Repo quality gate skill](.agents/skills/repo-quality-gate/SKILL.md): Required final verification workflow for code and documentation changes.
- [Weather feature workflow skill](.agents/skills/weather-feature-workflow/SKILL.md): Workflow for feature work spanning routes, persistence, weather data, React state, and dashboard components.
- [Drizzle SQLite migration skill](.agents/skills/drizzle-sqlite-migration/SKILL.md): Required workflow for schema and migration changes.
- [Singapore weather API skill](.agents/skills/sg-weather-api/SKILL.md): Local reference for Singapore data.gov.sg weather endpoints and response patterns.
- [Frontend visual QA skill](.agents/skills/frontend-visual-qa/SKILL.md): Browser verification workflow for layout, theme, Leaflet map, and responsive frontend behavior.

## Optional

- [DeepWiki index](https://deepwiki.com/optiflow/sg-weather-ops-dashboard): External code index for broad orientation; verify final claims against local files.
- [data.gov.sg 2-hour forecast](https://data.gov.sg/datasets/d_3f9e064e25005b0e42969944ccaf2e7a/view): Provider documentation for the app's primary forecast-area endpoint.
- [data.gov.sg realtime weather readings](https://data.gov.sg/collections/realtime-weather-readings/view): Provider documentation for temperature, humidity, rainfall, wind, PSI, PM2.5, and related readings.
- [data.gov.sg weather forecast collection](https://data.gov.sg/collections/weather-forecast/view): Provider documentation for broader Singapore forecast endpoints.
